description: There's no better time to come alive than when in the spotlight. Let the drum and bass anthem "Under Bright Lights" by TWERL and Ekko & Sidetrack carry you and your team to new heights.

localized_names.english: TWERL and Ekko & Sidetrack, Under Bright Lights

name: TWERL and Ekko & Sidetrack, Under Bright Lights
